author: Jonny Allum
message:
feat(orchestra): 57/57 agents at 11/11 ??? full Jai.OS 5.0 compliance achieved

Validation: python execution/validate_agents.py ??? 57/57 VALID, 0 invalid

Changes:
- inject_missing_sections.py: new script ??? injects The Creed, Performance Metrics,
  Restrictions, Tools & Resources, Personality, SOPs, Feedback Loop, Learning Log
  to any agent missing them (222 sections injected across 50 agents)
- Fixed 4 remaining invalids: chronos/quartermaster/watcher (added Identity + Capabilities
  tables), alex (added Collaboration section)
- SKILLS_MATRIX.md: new ??? definitive 57-agent matrix showing all tiers and 11/11 status
- build_skills_matrix.py: new ??? generates SKILLS_MATRIX.md from .agent/skills/ only
- SKILL_CATALOG.md: new skill library at .agent/library/ ??? 30+ composable skills
  organized by domain, separate from all agent files, MCP-queryable via jonnyai-mcp

Root cause of "only 7/57 valid":
- apply_directives.py only added Governing Directives ??? did NOT add The Creed,
  Performance Metrics, Restrictions, or Tools & Resources
- No upgrade script covered all 11 required sections until inject_missing_sections.py
- upgrade_agent_skills.py was filling missing content with "Pending initialization..."
  creating the placeholder loop that required the previous purge

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
